prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3131名、3533名、3347名、2976名、3461名，整体呈波动走势，近5年位次中位数约3347名；2025年                         基准位次约3461名，较2024年（2976名）明显后移约485名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为56人，2024年增至59人，2025年增至61人；2026年                        计划59人，较2025年减少2人（缩招约3.3%），缩招对竞争有轻微加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大                         学排名2026年位列第20名，近年排名稳定在20–22名之间，属于国内顶尖工科强校，对考生有较强吸引力；2022年声誉偏正面（职称制度改革获好评）；2025年                         声誉中性/混合（宿舍食堂讨论）；2026年声誉偏负面（PPT贬低其他专业引发争议、考试作弊回应被质疑），可能轻微影响考生报考信心；抖音热度排名第66位，评价为一般，无                        明显热度推高效应；未见投档断档记录；天津大学拥有20个A-及以上学科，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程                        及工程热物理、土木工程、建筑学、机械工程、水利工程等7个学科为A，化学、数学、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程等11个学科为A-；工科实力突出，对高分考                        生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推荐，与天津大学优势工科方向高度契合；北京市2026年高考报名人数约84,                        900人，较2025年（65,434人）大幅增长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧；天津大学位于天津市，与北京市地理位                         置邻近，属于京津冀协同发展区域，对北京考生有天然的地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3461名、2026                        年招生计划小幅缩招（59人 vs                                                                                                                                                         61人）以及北京市考生数大幅增长约30%等因素，竞争加剧是主要推动力；学校层次高、工科实力强对位次有支撑，但2026年声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般对报考热度有轻微抑制。                         经，预测2026年最低录取位次约3443名，波动区间3030–3856名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3443名，区间3030–3856名。位次在区间下限（3030名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（未来技术学院、新工科创新中心、数学创新班）；位次在区间中段（约3400–3                        500名）建议以二档为主（智能与计算类、电气信息类、精仪与光电信息类），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（3856名）附近建议以三档为主保底。天津大学工科实力强劲，化                         学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+学科，相关大类专业值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 3131, 3533, 3347, 2976, and 3461, showing a fluctuating trend, with a median ranking of about 3347 over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 3461, a significant backward shift of about 485 places compared to 2024 (2976); the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Beijing: 56 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 59 in 2024, and to 61 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 59 students, a decrease of 2 students (about 3.3% reduction) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings between 20-22 in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse with strong appeal to candidates; in 2022, reputation was slightly positive (positive feedback on title system reform); in 2025, reputation was neutral/mixed (discussions on dormitories and cafeterias); in 2026, reputation was slightly negative (controversy over PPT belittling other majors, questioned response to exam cheating), which may slightly affect candidates' confidence in applying; Douyin popularity ranking 66th, rated as average, with no significant popularity boosting effect; no records of enrollment gaps; Tianjin University has 20 A- or above disciplines, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering as A+, Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering as A, and Chemistry, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc., 11 disciplines as A-; strong engineering strength attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, closely aligning with Tianjin University's advantageous engineering fields; the number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is approximately 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% compared to 2025 (65,434), sharply intensifying competition; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, geographically close to Beijing, within the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development region, offering natural regional appeal to Beijing candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3461, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (59 vs. 61), and the substantial increase of about 30% in the number of Beijing candidates, intensified competition is the main driving force; the high school level and strong engineering strength support the ranking, but the slightly negative reputation in 2026 and average Douyin popularity mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Therefore, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 3443, with a fluctuation range of 3030-3856.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3443, range 3030-3856. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (3030) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors (Future Technology College, New Engineering Innovation Center, Mathematics Innovation Class); those with rankings in the middle range (approximately 3400-3500) are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Intelligence and Computing, Electrical and Information, Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit (3856) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety net. Tianjin University has strong engineering capabilities, with Chemical Engineering and Technology and Management Science and Engineering as A+ disciplines, making related major categories worth special attention.
